channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: First-person liminal psychological horror game Farsight announced for consoles, PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Due out in Q3 2026 for PC.

Indian developer Studio Noori have announced first-person liminal psychological horror game Farsight. It will launch for PC via Steam in Q3 2026, followed by unspecified consoles at a later date.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

You know the house in the eye exam.

But how do you so intimately recognize a place you’ve never been? You can’t help it, you must walk up the field, stretching on infinitely, up to the door… and knock.

A First-Person Horror Game Following a Kid Taking a Regular Eye Exam

Everything is strange when you’re twelve years old. They tell you how to talk, how to behave, how to see.

You make up stories. You just want to play. But they’ve noticed. And now, you’re being taken somewhere that promises to fix you.

Your Eyes Have Betrayed You

Peer through keyholes. Watch from a distance with binoculars. Peek beneath the surface of reality with the FUNTIME-GO camera.

And when it all gets a bit too much, and you want to crawl into a hole in the cursed, rotting earth, play with FUNTIME-GO, your handheld console, instead! Check out a small library of game cartridges from the 90’s and take 2-bit photos!

  • ❮
  • ❯

Welcome to CWell Eyecare

Established 1987. Three locations across the state. Specialists in pediatric vision care, refractive correction, longitudinal observation, and behavioral discipline.

CWell Eyecare. Where everyone is seen.

Key Features

  • Step Into the Liminal – Endless fields, looping corridors, a picture-perfect house, and a breath on the back of your neck, all feeling too familiar.
  • The House – Windows warm and inviting. Your whole life was leading up to this moment. It’s everything you’ve always wanted. Everything you’d die for.
  • Photograph What Isn’t There – Use the FUNTIME-GO, a 1990s-style handheld console, to take low-resolution photos that reveal things your eyes can’t see. And things you’ll wish you never had.
  • Play Games on the FUNTIME-GO – A small library of game cartridges for the FUNTIME-GO, worlds to escape into, where the only thing that matters is to play.
  • Use the Walkie-Talkie – Your only friend talks to you over the walkie-talkie. Until you hear whispers reaching you… beckoning you.
  • Use the Binoculars – Watch Them from a safe distance. Never let them watch you for too long.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery. Visit the official website here.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/first-person-liminal-psychological-horror-game-farsight-announced-for-consoles-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Tile matching roguelite action game Chivalware announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
Publishers The Arcade Crew and Imperfect Games, and developer Regal Pigeon have announced Chivalware, a tile-matching roguelite action game that with real-time, grid-based combat. It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date wa snot announced. A demo is available now.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Chivalware is a frantic tile-matching action roguelite. Challenge your reflexes and coordination in real-time on a grid battlefield: evade attacks, match tiles to charge your weapons, and find the right opportunity to strike.

Slay the King!

You are a Disk Knight—a legendary warrior who wields weapon disks! The kingdom calls on you to slay its King, driven mad by power and years of isolation. But as you carve your way toward the castle, strange glitches suggest something deeper is at play…

The Power of Floppy Disks!

Equip up to three weapon disks, each with its own color. Charge a weapon’s energy by matching tiles on the battlefield; the more you match, the more you can attack!

  • ❮
  • ❯

Match, Evade-Evade-Evade, and Strike!

Constantly move in and out of enemy attacks as you recharge your weapons on the fly! Read the patterns on the battlefield to find the right opportunity to strike. Never stay still, a Disk Knight is always evading or planning his next attack!

Death is Not the End!

A Disk Knight may fall in battle, but defeat unlocks new possibilities:

  • Four playable Disk Knights, each with a unique mechanic.
  • Over 80 weapons and more than 150 upgrades to unlock.
  • New Bosses to encounter.
  • Countless unique builds to master!

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/tile-matching-roguelite-action-game-chivalware-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Silver Pines launches October 8
item.content:encoded:
Metroidvania-style survival horror game Silver Pines will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store on October 8, publisher Team17 and developer Wych Elm announced. A demo is available now for PC.

Here is an overview of the game, via Team17:

About

Private investigator Red Walker finds himself in the rundown American town of Silver Pines, a place seemingly abandoned in a rush. Soon after, a mysterious phone call makes his next move clear: “Find Eddie Velvet”… and so the descent into darkness begins. Silver Pines combines classic survival horror puzzle solving and resource & inventory management with disorientating, sprawling exploration of the dreamlike small town, where players will slowly untangle its mysteries and nightmares.

Key Features

  • An Experience of Mystery and Dread – Embark on a journey filled with dread and atmosphere. Haunted by shadows of the past, Silver Pines is waiting to reveal its dark secrets.
  • Survival Horror Gameplay – A love letter to classic survival-horror, from a unique 2.5D perspective. Fight or evade the terrors of the town as you scavenge for resources and solutions to the puzzles blocking your way.
  • Metroidvania Navigation – Filled with locked doors and hidden paths, every turn holds an uncovered clue, a resource… or something waiting in the dark.
  • Visceral, Grounded Action – Overcome the horrors populating the town that keep every heart-stopping encounter tense and dangerous.
  • Resource and Inventory Management – Inventory space is limited! Search everywhere for items because every bullet, bottle of medicine and upgrade matters.
  • Dreamlike Visuals – Hand-painted, rotoscoped animations, coupled with a neo-noir inspired aesthetic, makes Silver Pines a visually striking, otherworldly experience
  • Suspicious Townsfolk – Meet and interact with Silver Pines‘ strange cast of characters making up its populace, as you delve into the mysteries they keep from outsiders.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date and Demo Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/silver-pines-launches-october-8
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
